title: Release readiness validation config v1 (SCRUM-167 target)
description: Shape aligned with TalkBack ops/release-readiness/config.yaml, extended for config-driven evidence keys. Defaults should preserve TalkBack parity.

validations.description: Registry of known validation keys and human descriptions.

evidence_boolean_keys.description: Top-level evidence JSON keys (smoke/e2e) that set val_map[k]=True when true. Replaces the hardcoded tuple in merge_validations. TalkBack default: auth_session, upload_extraction, nav_assets, viewer_materials, qa_rag, migrations_validated.

risk_category_to_required_validation.description: Optional map from risk category (from risk_from_paths) to required validation key. TalkBack default includes migrations -> migrations_validated; other categories use identity mapping.

risk_from_paths.description: Unchanged from TalkBack: rules mapping path patterns to risk categories.
